title: Look! You Can See the Feelings!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Twirly twirl! La la la!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The red and pink colors are so pretty! It's like a
butterfly! Or a flower!
choice_data_list: The kimono looks great on you.
The kimono looks great on you.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I don't know much about patterns, so I
said that I wanted one that was pretty!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And then this lovely outfit is what they gave me! I
was so amazed!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Let's go somewhere right now!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
A shrine! I wanna go to a shrine! Do you think any
food stalls will be open?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We come to a shrine to find an assortment of
food stalls open. Though not to the extent of
New Year's, business looks to be doing well.

text_block_list.name: Man at the Shrine
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look! The kimono that girl's wearing looks
kinda amazing!

text_block_list.name: Woman in Thick Clothing
text_block_list.text:
You're right! It's so pretty and vibrant, like
flowers!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you! Actually, it's—

text_block_list.name: Boy with His Mother
text_block_list.text: Mom, look! The clothes she's wearing are so cute!

text_block_list.name: Boy's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That's called a kimono, honey. The bottom half is
called a hakama—wait, is that a skirt? What a
bold design!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Did you know? This is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every time Haru Urara opens her mouth to reply,
the person she tries to talk to disappears, swept
along by the moving crowd.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aww, they're gone! What a shame!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's go pray! I wanna show off my outfit
to the gods as well!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hello gods! This is my new outfit! Don't I look
super-duper cute?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep on doing my best wearing this, so
please give me your blessings!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take a short rest after having paid our
respects. In the meantime, I ask Haru Urara what
she tried to tell the passersby.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! They all loved my outfit, remember? So I
wanted to tell them all the great things about the
kimono!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Like how the flowers are carefully drawn by an
"artisan," or so I learned! Even all these tiny
flowers!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to talk about the people who did all the
cutting and string pulling. And also about this hair
thingy and this dangly belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Haru Urara's word choice isn't very
sophisticated, her enthusiasm and joy are
conveyed loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She continues to explain all the details of her
outfit to me with the brightest smile I've seen all
day.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Everyone put in their most, best effort. And all
for me too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Isn't it amazing? I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she said, her outfit is indeed the product
of many skilled craftspeople. Donning the fruit of
their combined effort...
choice_data_list: You must be bursting with energy!
You must be bursting with energy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Wearing this, I feel like I can do tons of
things I normally can't!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Just like everyone who made this, I have to pour
everything I got into training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She flashes me a smile so warm it seems to repel
the wintry breeze.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she said, her outfit is indeed the product
of many skilled craftspeople. Donning the fruit of
their combined effort...
choice_data_list: It's like they'll always be there to support you.
It's like they'll always be there to support you.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah... you're right!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I asked for pretty clothing, but it turns out it's
much more than just pretty!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: They'll always be with me, even when I'm running!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I won't ever be lonely while racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara lovingly touches her new outfit with a
great big smile on her face.
